race.comment: STAR CASINO (5) finished second last time out over this course and distance, travelling towards the tail before winding up strongly in the dying stages. Has a strong record here at this journey with two wins from four runs. Leading contender. IOANE (2) kicked the prep off in good order at Yarra Valley with a win back in Jan. Has mixed his form since but boasts peaks that measure right up. Finds a nice race and can play a significant role. BLAKMAX (1) drops back to a much more suitable grade after some flat efforts against stronger opposition. Has the class to figure prominently. HOLDER MAID (6) showed good early dash and raced on the speed last start before fading to finish fourth over 1498m at this track. Cannot be underestimated. JAMROCK (3) returns and has run well without winning. Will be looking for further after this but this is a kickoff point.
